description: Pins the allow_auto_disk_resize type rejection and the mutate POST. Both languages omit allow_auto_disk_resize unless the caller sets it (API default true), so a minimal call sends an empty body; an explicit value is sent verbatim. Confirm passed so Go clears its confirm gate. The linode_id-required text diverges (Go 'linode_id is required and must be positive' vs Python 'linode_id must be a positive integer') - see report.

cases.name: mutates the instance with the API default
mutates the instance with an explicit option
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This upgrades the instance and may cause downtime. Set confirm=true to proceed.
